projects.title: Geophysical Surveys for the Tororo–Amagoro Irrigation Scheme
projects.description: Comprehensive geophysical investigation combining Seismic Refraction Tomography, Multichannel Analysis of Surface Waves (MASW), and Site Seismic Intensity Analysis for the Tororo–Amagoro irrigation development project. Subsurface characterisation to support design of irrigation canals, intake structures and water distribution infrastructure for the Ministry of Water and Environment.
projects.client: Ministry of Water and Environment, Uganda
projects.scope: Seismic Refraction Tomography, MASW, and Site Seismic Intensity Analysis for irrigation infrastructure design
projects.activities: Seismic Refraction Tomography, MASW, Site Seismic Intensity Analysis
results: Seismic Refraction Tomography completed for irrigation scheme area
MASW surveys for dynamic soil properties and site classification
Site Seismic Intensity Analysis for infrastructure resilience assessment
Foundation and design parameters delivered for irrigation development

projects.title: Geophysical Survey for Pre-feasibility Engineering Studies and Assessment for the Proposed Kampala Livestock Feeds Mill Plant
projects.description: Downhole Seismic survey for the pre-feasibility engineering studies and site assessment for the proposed Kampala Livestock Feeds Mill plant in Luweero District. In-situ borehole seismic velocity profiling for dynamic soil property determination, seismic site classification, and foundation design for large-scale industrial processing infrastructure.
projects.scope: Downhole Seismic survey for industrial plant site characterisation and foundation design
projects.activities: Downhole Seismic Survey, Dynamic Soil Properties, Seismic Site Classification
results: Downhole seismic survey completed for feeds mill plant site
In-situ P-wave and S-wave velocity profiling for dynamic properties
Seismic site classification per international building code standards
Foundation design parameters delivered for industrial infrastructure

projects.title: Geophysical Surveys for Matanda Irrigation Scheme
projects.description: Seismic Refraction Tomography survey for the feasibility assessment and engineering design of the proposed Matanda Irrigation Scheme in Kanungu District. Subsurface velocity profiling to characterise overburden thickness, bedrock depth, and rippability for canal alignment and intake structure foundation design.
projects.scope: Seismic Refraction Tomography for irrigation scheme feasibility and design
projects.activities: Seismic Refraction Tomography, Bedrock Profiling, Rippability Assessment
results: Seismic Refraction Tomography surveys completed at Matanda irrigation site
Subsurface velocity profiling for bedrock and overburden characterisation
Rippability assessment and canal alignment recommendations
Foundation design inputs for intake structures delivered

projects.title: Geophysical Surveys for Technical Assessment of Existing Firewall Pillar Foundations at Nalubale Hydropower Station
projects.description: High-Resolution Seismic Refraction Tomography (HRSRT) combined with Rebound Hammer testing and Reinforcement Locator surveys for technical integrity assessment of existing firewall pillar foundations at the Nalubale (Owen Falls) Hydropower Station. Non-destructive investigation of ageing concrete infrastructure for Uganda's flagship power generation asset.
projects.scope: HRSRT, rebound hammer, and reinforcement locator surveys for concrete pillar integrity assessment
projects.activities: HRSRT, Rebound Hammer Testing, Reinforcement Detection, Structural Assessment
results: High-resolution seismic refraction tomography for pillar foundation imaging
Rebound hammer testing for concrete strength assessment
Reinforcement locator survey for steel reinforcement mapping
Technical integrity assessment report and remediation recommendations

projects.title: Geophysical Surveys for the Feasibility Study of the Nakiwogo Bridge Construction Project
projects.description: Electrical Resistivity Tomography (ERT) survey for the feasibility study of the proposed Nakiwogo Bridge construction project in Kampala. Subsurface resistivity imaging to characterise foundation conditions, identify potential weak zones, and inform abutment and pier foundation design for critical transport infrastructure.
projects.scope: ERT survey for bridge foundation characterisation and feasibility assessment
projects.activities: ERT Survey, Bridge Foundation Assessment, Subsurface Imaging
results: ERT survey completed for proposed Nakiwogo bridge alignment
Subsurface resistivity profiling for foundation condition assessment
Identification of competent strata and potential weak zones
Foundation design parameters for abutment and pier engineering

projects.title: Alluvial Gold Exploration and Reserves Estimation in Ituri
projects.description: Reconnaissance alluvial gold exploration and preliminary reserves estimation program in the Ituri region, Democratic Republic of Congo. Integrated Gold Detector data analysis, geological mapping, and geochemical sampling supported by satellite SAR remote sensing for regional target delineation and resource potential assessment.
projects.scope: Gold detector data analysis, geological mapping, geochemical sampling, SAR sensing for regional exploration targeting
projects.activities: Gold Detection, Geological Mapping, Geochemical Sampling, SAR Remote Sensing
results: Regional alluvial gold exploration program completed across Ituri
Geological mapping and geochemical sampling for target delineation
SAR remote sensing analysis for regional structural interpretation
Preliminary reserves estimation framework delivered

projects.title: Integrated Geophysical Survey for Pegmatite Exploration in Rweru Sector — Cassiterite, Coltan and Cobalt Assessment
projects.description: Integrated mineral exploration programme combining onshore ground magnetics, deep Electrical Resistivity Tomography (ERT) and Induced Polarisation (IP) surveys for pegmatite-hosted cassiterite, coltan and cobalt mineralisation in the Rweru Sector. Multi-method approach to delineate subsurface pegmatite bodies and define drill targets.
projects.scope: Onshore ground magnetics, deep ERT, and IP surveys for pegmatite-hosted Sn-Ta-Co exploration
projects.activities: Ground Magnetics, Deep ERT, Induced Polarisation, Pegmatite Targeting
results: Integrated multi-method geophysical survey for pegmatite exploration
Onshore magnetics for structural mapping and target delineation
Deep ERT and IP surveys for subsurface pegmatite body characterisation
Drill target recommendations for cassiterite, coltan and cobalt

projects.title: Geophysical Surveys for Pegmatite Mineral Exploration in Gasabo
projects.description: Deep Electrical Resistivity Tomography (ERT) survey for pegmatite-hosted mineral exploration in the Gasabo area of Rwanda. High-resolution subsurface resistivity imaging to delineate pegmatite body geometry, depth extent, and lateral continuity for drill-hole targeting.
projects.scope: Deep ERT survey for pegmatite body delineation and drill target definition
projects.activities: Deep ERT Survey, Pegmatite Delineation, Drill Targeting
results: Deep ERT survey completed for pegmatite body imaging
Subsurface resistivity characterisation across the exploration area
Pegmatite body geometry and depth extent mapped
Drill-hole target recommendations delivered

projects.title: Geophysical Surveys along the Standard Gauge Railway Corridor, Eastern Uganda
projects.description: Seismic Refraction Tomography and Multichannel Analysis of Surface Waves (MASW) surveys along sections of the Standard Gauge Railway corridor in Eastern Uganda. Subsurface profiling for earthwork design, cut-and-fill optimisation, and foundation characterisation for this nationally strategic transport infrastructure project.
projects.scope: Seismic Refraction Tomography and MASW surveys for SGR corridor subsurface characterisation
projects.activities: Seismic Refraction Tomography, MASW, Railway Corridor Profiling
results: Comprehensive seismic surveys along SGR alignment in Eastern Uganda

MASW surveys for dynamic soil characterisation and site classification
Subsurface parameters delivered for cut-and-fill optimisation

projects.title: Integrated Geophysical and Geotechnical Investigation for Mwogo, Rukarara, and Kavili Dam Sites
projects.description: Comprehensive geophysical investigation using Seismic Refraction (1200m) and MASW (1200m) methods for three proposed dam sites. Data correlation with geotechnical parameters for optimal dam design and foundation characterization.
